subcodes.title: Words to someone who asked for money, spoken on 1913-05-31
subcodes.first_line: Never be a spendthrift. Do not be extravagant in thy expenses. An extravagant person comes always to a sad end and feels the pinch of want and misery.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ولی وِل خرجی مکن زیرا اسراف همیشه انسان را ملول و سرگردان نماید من اگر می‌بینید بعضی تعارفات
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @moderation; frugality; simplicity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
